claim: The Reynolds number Re = rho v L / mu is dimensionless.
success_criteria: Assigns physical dimensions to density, velocity, length, and dynamic viscosity.
Computes the combined units of rho v L / mu.
failure_modes: Uses kinematic viscosity while still using the dynamic viscosity formula.
Only states the definition without dimensional verification.
prompt: Verify dimensionally that Reynolds number Re = rho v L / mu is dimensionless when rho is density, v velocity, L length, and mu dynamic viscosity.
